entries.source: "Help me prepare for finals"
entries.value: "Ìrànlọ́wọ́ mi múra fún finals"

entries.source: "Make a JEE revision schedule"
entries.value: "Ṣe JEE àtúnyẹ̀wò schedule"

entries.source: "Plan 2 weeks for biology"
entries.value: "Ètò 2 àwọn ọ̀sẹ̀ fún biology"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Exam Prep Planner on inspir for planning learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò fún lílo Olùṣètò Ìmúrasílẹ̀ Ìdánwò lórí inspir fún ẹ̀kọ́ ìṣètò, pẹ̀lú àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́, àti àwọn ìwà AI tó ní ààbò síi.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Lágbára síi ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́

entries.source: AI Exam Prep Planner For Realistic Study Schedules is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Build a realistic exam plan from your date, syllabus, strengths, and weak areas.
entries.value: Olùṣètò Ìmúrasílẹ̀ Ìdánwò AI fún Ìṣètò Ẹ̀kọ́ Tó Bá Ayé Mu jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ lọ́nà aláìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Kọ́ tó bá ayé mu ètò ìdánwò láti tirẹ ọjọ́, àkójọ ẹ̀kọ́, strengths, àti àwọn ibi aláìlera.

entries.source: AI Exam Prep Planner Study Schedule Guide
entries.value: AI Ìmúrasílẹ̀ ìdánwò olùṣètò ìṣètò àkókò ẹ̀kọ́ ìtọ́sọ́nà

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI olùkọ́

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Béèrè fún small àkọ́kọ́ ìgbésẹ̀ dípò ìdáhùn ìkẹyìn.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Béèrè AI láti ṣàyẹ̀wò tirẹ ìrònú, kì í ṣe kan èsì.

entries.source: Exam Prep Planner
entries.value: Ètò Ìmúrasílẹ̀ fún Àdánwò

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish nípasẹ̀ kíkọ èrò back láti ìrántí.

entries.source: Plan review.
entries.value: Ètò àtúnyẹ̀wò.

entries.source: Planning
entries.value: Ìpinnu

entries.source: Prioritize topics.
entries.value: Prioritize àwọn kókó.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Àwọn ìbéèrè láti gbìmọ̀ wò

entries.source: Start the live mode at Exam Prep Planner. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Flashcard Builder. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ taara ipo ní ìdánwò Prep Planner. bí ìwọ fẹ́ neighboring ẹ̀kọ́ fọ́ọ̀mù, gbìyànjú kaadi ìrántí Olùkọ́. fún gbooro síi ìwòye ti pẹpẹ, ka kí AI ẹ̀kọ́ alábàákẹ́kọ̀ọ́ yẹ kí ṣe fún gbogbo ènìyàn.

entries.source: Students who need a plan that balances revision, practice, confidence, and real life.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ tí wọ́n nílò ètò tó ṣe ìwọ̀ntúnwọ̀nsì láàárín àtúnyẹ̀wò, ìdánilẹ́kọ̀ọ́, ìgbọ́kànlé, àti ìgbésí ayé gidi.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell ipo kí ìwọ jẹ́ trying láti kọ́ tàbí produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Yẹn ìyàtọ̀ fi hàn up nínú ìṣàn. Instead ti one giant ìdáhùn, tó dára jù àwọn ìpàdé lọ nípasẹ̀ ìyípo: set àfojúsùn, gbìyànjú ohun kan, gba ìdáhùn, túnṣe aláìlera spot, àti yan tó kàn ìgbésẹ̀.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Yẹn focus ṣe pàtàkì. general chatbot lè ìdáhùn fẹ́rẹ̀ẹ́ anything, ṣùgbọ́n ẹ̀kọ́ ipo gives ìjíròrò shape. ó nudges ìwọ toward irú ti thinking, adaṣe, ìdáhùn, tàbí ìṣàwárí yẹn ràn lọ́wọ́ èrò stick.

entries.source: The planner prioritizes weak areas, adds review loops, and creates fallback plans for missed days.
entries.value: Ètò náà máa ń fi àwọn kúlẹ̀kúlẹ̀ tí o kò mọ̀ dáadáa ṣáájú, ó máa ń fi àwọn àtúnyẹ̀wò kún un, ó sì máa ń ṣètò ọ̀nà mìíràn fún àwọn ọjọ́ tí o bá pàdánù.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Yìí jẹ́ kan náà ìṣe àṣà lẹ́yìn studying pẹ̀lú AI láìsí jìyà ara rẹ: pa mọ́ akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ active. AI jẹ́ jù wúlò nígbà tí ó gives ìwọ ìdáhùn lórí tirẹ thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Yìí ipo jẹ́ pàápàá wúlò fún àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ta fẹ́ láti:

entries.source: Track risk areas.
entries.value: Tọ́pa àwọn agbègbè ewu.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Gbìmọ̀ wò ìgbésẹ̀ ní ọ̀rọ̀ tirẹ.

entries.source: Use Exam Prep Planner when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Lo Olùṣètò Ìmúrasílẹ̀ Ìdánwò nígbà tí Ìwọ fẹ́ ìpàdé yẹn bẹ̀rẹ̀ yarayara ṣùgbọ́n síbẹ̀ adapts láti ìwọ. àkọ́kọ́ àfojúsùn jẹ́ kì í ṣe láti sound impressive. àkọ́kọ́ àfojúsùn jẹ́ láti ṣe tó kàn ìgbésẹ̀ feel ṣeé ṣe.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Kí yìí ipo ń ràn lọ́wọ́ pẹ̀lú

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Ibo láti go tó kàn

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Ìwọ lè pẹ̀lú bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú àkọ́kọ́ ẹ̀dà ti tirẹ gidi ìṣòro. rúdurùdu àkọ́kọ́ ìbéèrè jẹ́ fine. ìpàdé lè clarify ìpele, olùgbọ́, àkókò ipari, àti style once ìwọ begin.
